scope.default: No scope - requires full key paths

returns.description: Function that resolves literal keys to translated strings

scoped_translation.output: Create (EN) / Créer (FR) / Criar (PT) / 创建 (CN) / Crear (ES)

nested_keys.output: This field is required (EN) / Champ obligatoire (FR) / etc.

implementation_strategy.data_source: L17 literals layer via Data Model API

caching.level_3_api: Fetch from API if not cached (network call)

fallback_strategy.step_3: Return key itself if not found (e.g., '[projects.unknown]')

typescript_interface.TranslationFunction: type TranslationFunction = (key: string, vars?: Record<string, any>) => string;
typescript_interface.Literal: interface Literal { key: string; default_en: string; default_fr: string; default_pt: string; default_cn: string; default_es: string; }

hook_implementation_pseudo.step_4_resolve_key: function t(key: string, vars?: any): string { const fullKey = scope ? `${scope}.${key}` : key; const literal = literals[fullKey]; if (!literal) return `[${fullKey}]`; const text = literal[`default_${lang}`] || literal.default_en; return interpolate(text, vars); }

benefits: Easy to add new languages (just add columns to L17)

test_checks: All components call useLiterals() to get translation function
All UI text uses t() function
anti_hardcoding_test_integration.test_explanation: Matches quoted strings starting with uppercase (UI text) excluding technical patterns

performance_considerations.initial_load: Fetch all literals for scope on component mount (~1-5 KB JSON)
performance_considerations.language_switching: No refetch needed (all 5 languages in cache)
performance_considerations.network_impact: 1 API call per scope per session (cached in localStorage)

next_steps.4: Update templates to replace inline ternaries with useLiterals calls
